_schema_note: Real hand-labeled examples from data/clips/example_01 (rural, motion-blurred -- kept as a stress test) and data/clips/example_02 (clear downtown driving). Boxes were estimated by visually inspecting the raw, unannotated frames directly -- independent of any model output -- so this is a genuine held-out label set, not a copy of the pipeline's own predictions.

examples.command: stop behind the white car ahead
watch out for the cyclist on the left

examples.note: two candidate cars visible (white, closer; dark, further back-left) -- gold picks the nearer one, but the point of this tier is checking whether the model picks a defensible candidate at all rather than exact IoU

examples.command: pull over next to the red truck
examples.note: no truck of any color present in this frame -- correct behavior is to abstain, not hallucinate a box

examples.command: stop next to the fruit stand on the right
examples.note: heavy motion blur makes any specific object at this location unconfirmable even on close visual inspection -- correct behavior is low confidence / abstain, not a confident guess
